title: Publications | Ministry of Health NZ
content:
## Publications Ngā whakaputanga kōrero
- Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorder Action Plan 2025-2028 Publication date: 9 September 2025 The Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorder (FASD) Action Plan 2025-2028 sets out the Government’s roadmap for improving outcomes for FASD. It establishes clear priority actions for government agencies to deliver, outcomes to guide progress over time, and a framework for monitoring and evaluation. Publication Fetal alcohol spectrum disorder Alcohol Public health

## Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorder Action Plan 2025-2028
The Fetal Alcohol Spectrum Disorder (FASD) Action Plan 2025-2028 sets out the Government’s roadmap for improving outcomes for FASD. It establishes clear priority actions for government agencies to deliver, outcomes to guide progress over time, and a framework for monitoring and evaluation.
- Fetal alcohol spectrum disorder
- New Zealand Eating Issues and Eating Disorders Strategy Publication date: 3 September 2025 The New Zealand Eating Issues and Eating Disorders Strategy will move New Zealand towards a future where people and their families are able to access full continuum of eating disorders care spanning prevention and early intervention to specialist community and inpatient services. Publication Mental health

## New Zealand Eating Issues and Eating Disorders Strategy
The New Zealand Eating Issues and Eating Disorders Strategy will move New Zealand towards a future where people and their families are able to access full continuum of eating disorders care spanning prevention and early intervention to specialist community and inpatient services.
- Determining our Future Publication date: 22 August 2025 This independent report prepared by the Public Health Advisory Committee for the Minister of Health, reviews progress in addressing the determinants of health equity and wellbeing in Aotearoa, assesses future challenges, and recommends actions to achieve a healthy future for everyone. Publication Public Health Advisory Committee

## Determining our Future
This independent report prepared by the Public Health Advisory Committee for the Minister of Health, reviews progress in addressing the determinants of health equity and wellbeing in Aotearoa, assesses future challenges, and recommends actions to achieve a healthy future for everyone.
- Public Health Advisory Committee
- Section 99 Inspection into Canterbury – Waitaha Adult Inpatient and Associated Mental Health Services Publication date: 12 August 2025 This report is the result of an inspection of Canterbury – Waitaha adult inpatient and associated mental health services. The Director of Mental Health has powers under section 99 of the Mental Health (Compulsory Assessment and Treatment) Act 1992 to inspect any hospital, or any ward, unit, or other part of a hospital, in which psychiatric treatment is given. Publication Mental health

## Section 99 Inspection into Canterbury – Waitaha Adult Inpatient and Associated Mental Health Services
This report is the result of an inspection of Canterbury – Waitaha adult inpatient and associated mental health services. The Director of Mental Health has powers under section 99 of the Mental Health (Compulsory Assessment and Treatment) Act 1992 to inspect any hospital, or any ward, unit, or other part of a hospital, in which psychiatric treatment is given.
- New Zealand Clinical Principles Framework for Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder Publication date: 21 July 2025 Last updated: 6 October 2025 This framework contains information for health professionals and the public on the standards they should expect for evidence-based assessment, diagnosis, and treatment for ADHD in New Zealand. Publication Diseases & conditions

## New Zealand Clinical Principles Framework for Attention Deficit Hyperactivity Disorder
This framework contains information for health professionals and the public on the standards they should expect for evidence-based assessment, diagnosis, and treatment for ADHD in New Zealand.
- Diseases & conditions
- Public Health Guidance for Hairdressers and Barbers Publication date: 17 July 2025 The Public Health Guidance for Hairdressers and Barbers outlines practical actions that hairdressers and barbers can take to reduce the spread of infection. Publication Public health

## Public Health Guidance for Hairdressers and Barbers
The Public Health Guidance for Hairdressers and Barbers outlines practical actions that hairdressers and barbers can take to reduce the spread of infection.
- Registrar (assisted dying) Annual Report – June 2025 Publication date: 15 July 2025 The Registrar (assisted dying) Annual Report to the Minister of Health covers the period from 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025. Publication Assisted dying

## Registrar (assisted dying) Annual Report – June 2025
The Registrar (assisted dying) Annual Report to the Minister of Health covers the period from 1 April 2024 to 31 March 2025.
- Ministry of Health Official Information Act 1982 Policy Publication date: 11 July 2025 This policy reinforces the Ministry of Health’s commitment to the principles and purposes of the Official Information Act 1982 (the Act), and to progressively making more official information publicly available. Publication Ministry policies

## Ministry of Health Official Information Act 1982 Policy
This policy reinforces the Ministry of Health’s commitment to the principles and purposes of the Official Information Act 1982 (the Act), and to progressively making more official information publicly available.
- Consultation on the Code of Practice for Sealed Radioactive Material: ORS C12 2020 Publication date: 27 June 2025 Last updated: 18 August 2025 The Director for Radiation Safety has reviewed the Code of Practice for Sealed Radioactive Material: ORS C12 2020. The review was conducted in accordance with section 90 of the Radiation Safety Act 2016. Consultation Radiation safety

## Consultation on the Code of Practice for Sealed Radioactive Material: ORS C12 2020
The Director for Radiation Safety has reviewed the Code of Practice for Sealed Radioactive Material: ORS C12 2020. The review was conducted in accordance with section 90 of the Radiation Safety Act 2016.
- Funding to Māori Health Providers 2019/20 to 2023/24 Publication date: 26 June 2025 This publication summarises funding to Māori health providers by the Ministry of Health, Health NZ and the now disestablished Māori Health Authority. It follows on from our previous reports in 2017, and every year from 2021 onwards. Publication Māori health Health system

## Funding to Māori Health Providers 2019/20 to 2023/24
This publication summarises funding to Māori health providers by the Ministry of Health, Health NZ and the now disestablished Māori Health Authority. It follows on from our previous reports in 2017, and every year from 2021 onwards.
- Consultation on the Code of Practice for Unsealed Radioactive Material: ORS C11 2020 Publication date: 25 June 2025 Last updated: 18 August 2025 The Director for Radiation Safety has reviewed the Code of Practice for Unsealed Radioactive Material: ORS C11 2020. The review was conducted in accordance with section 90 of the Radiation Safety Act 2016. Consultation Radiation safety

## Consultation on the Code of Practice for Unsealed Radioactive Material: ORS C11 2020
The Director for Radiation Safety has reviewed the Code of Practice for Unsealed Radioactive Material: ORS C11 2020. The review was conducted in accordance with section 90 of the Radiation Safety Act 2016.
- Consultation on the Code of Practice for Irradiating Apparatus: ORS C10 2020 Publication date: 23 June 2025 Last updated: 18 August 2025 The Director for Radiation Safety has reviewed the Code of Practice for Irradiating Apparatus: ORS C10 2020.  The review was conducted in accordance with section 90 of the Radiation Safety Act 2016. Consultation Radiation safety

## Consultation on the Code of Practice for Irradiating Apparatus: ORS C10 2020
The Director for Radiation Safety has reviewed the Code of Practice for Irradiating Apparatus: ORS C10 2020.  The review was conducted in accordance with section 90 of the Radiation Safety Act 2016.
- Maximum Contribution Applying in Each Region From 1 July 2025 Publication date: 23 June 2025 The maximum contribution that applies in each region for long-term aged residential care, from 1 July 2025. Notice Older people (65+)

## Maximum Contribution Applying in Each Region From 1 July 2025
The maximum contribution that applies in each region for long-term aged residential care, from 1 July 2025.
- Consultation on the Code of Practice for Veterinary Radiation: ORS C9 2020 Publication date: 18 June 2025 Last updated: 18 August 2025 The Director for Radiation Safety has reviewed the Code of Practice for Veterinary Radiation: ORS C9 2020 (ORS C9 2020). The review was conducted in accordance with section 90 of the Radiation Safety Act 2016. Consultation Radiation safety

## Consultation on the Code of Practice for Veterinary Radiation: ORS C9 2020
The Director for Radiation Safety has reviewed the Code of Practice for Veterinary Radiation: ORS C9 2020 (ORS C9 2020). The review was conducted in accordance with section 90 of the Radiation Safety Act 2016.
- Suicide Prevention Action Plan 2025–2029 Publication date: 17 June 2025 The plan sets out new key actions health entities and other government agencies will undertake from 2025 to 2029 to prevent suicide in New Zealand. The new actions are focused on addressing gaps and ensuring more people have access to support when they need it. Publication Suicide Mental health

## Suicide Prevention Action Plan 2025–2029
The plan sets out new key actions health entities and other government agencies will undertake from 2025 to 2029 to prevent suicide in New Zealand. The new actions are focused on addressing gaps and ensuring more people have access to support when they need it.
